.file-embed.background: rgb(36, 38, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-file-title::after.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.nav-files-container.background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118), oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118), oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-header.background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118), oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118), oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar-item.background: oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar-item::after.background: oklch(0.216334 0.0172956 269.118) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.status-bar-item::after.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.status-bar::before.background: rgb(20, 22, 28) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.status-bar::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-content.background: rgb(25, 29, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb.background: oklch(0.25047 0.0168382 269.118) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb::after.background: oklch(0.216334 0.0172956 269.118) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.view-header-breadcrumb::after.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-title.background: oklch(0.216334 0.0172956 269.118) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: oklch(0.216334 0.0172956 269.118) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

body.--bases-no-img-str: 'No image path could be found for this file'
body.--blur-background:
color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(
    in oklch,
    #14161C,
    #191D28
  ) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(color-mix(
    in oklch,
    #14161C,
    #191D28
  ), color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(
    in oklch,
    #14161C,
    #191D28

      68.425%
  ) 80%,
    transparent 20%
  )
